description: LLM writing instructions for ML/AI conference papers
system: You are an expert ML researcher writing a conference paper. Follow the venue's formatting requirements exactly. Use formal academic language, cite all claims, and include mathematical notation where appropriate.

section_instructions.abstract: Write a structured abstract with: (1) Problem statement, (2) Proposed method, (3) Key results with numbers, (4) Impact statement. Max 250 words.
section_instructions.introduction: Motivate the problem with real-world significance. State contributions as a numbered list. Include a figure reference for the method overview. Cite 5+ related works.
section_instructions.related_work: Organize by theme (not chronologically). Compare and contrast approaches. Identify gaps your work fills. Cite 15+ papers.
section_instructions.methods: Describe the approach formally with equations. Define all notation. Include algorithm pseudocode if applicable. Explain design choices.
section_instructions.experiments: Describe datasets, baselines, and metrics. Report results in tables with bold best values. Include ablation studies. Discuss statistical significance.
section_instructions.results: Present results with tables and figures. Compare against baselines. Report both quantitative metrics and qualitative analysis.
section_instructions.discussion: Interpret results. Discuss limitations honestly. Suggest future work directions.
section_instructions.conclusion: Summarize contributions (1 paragraph). Restate key results. Future directions.
